PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for David Philpot (Executor).

The Court expressed concern about whether there are any Heirs and what other efforts were made in locating Heirs outside of searching the contents of the Decedent's apartment. Ms. McFadden stated that no other efforts were made, that she had a discussion with the Executor, and that this is based on the Executor's knowledge and relationship with the Decedent. Ms. McFadden also stated that the Executor was with the Decedent the day he passed away and that the Decedent told the Executor that he did not want anyone contacted. The Court expressed that based on what was stated, it could mean that the Decedent does have Family. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to October 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further efforts to locate Heirs.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
